Korean memory giant with hidden supply; Cramer blindsided by competitor supply in past cycles; could crash memory market if unleashed.
Parabolic 215% gain in 12mo but -15% in 5 days, -12% overnight; memory super-cycle volatility proxy; watch for stabilization before adding.

9% post-earnings drop triggered panic sector rotation away from hardware; up 370% in 12 months, 140% YTD — valuation unsustainable. Investors extrapolating Korean memory weakness to U.S. data center demand collapse.
